name: Pecan Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 15-ounce custard cup, melt the butter or margarine on 100% power for 30 to 40 seconds.
2. Swirl the melted butter in the custard cup, coating the sides and bottom.
3. Pour the excess butter from the custard cup into the beaten egg.
4. Stir in the dark corn syrup and vanilla extract.
5. Combine the flour and baking powder.
6. Mix the flour mixture into the egg mixture.
7. Gently fold in the chopped pecans.
8. Pour the pecan mixture into the buttered 15-ounce custard cup.
9. Cook on 50% power for 3 to 4 minutes, rotating the custard cup a half-turn every minute until just set.
10. Sift powdered sugar over the top and serve warm with light cream if desired.
